author: BanyanSo
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A lightweight Memos entry for Obsidian: quick capture, daily context, monthly collection, and local-first control.

manifest.author: BanyanSo
manifest.description: Capture local-first memos into daily notes and monthly archives.
manifest.name: Knomo

name: Knomo

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo 0.8.8

### Improvements
- Improved the mobile memo creation and composer opening experience.
- Improved mobile card rendering stability and reduced stutters while browsing cards.
- Improved the stability of tag tree expansion in the desktop sidebar.
- Improved the fullscreen image viewing experience on mobile.
- Added support for bare `http://` and `https://` URLs in the With links filter.

---

### 改进
- 改进移动端创建 Memo 和打开输入框的交互体验。
- 改进移动端卡片渲染稳定性，减少浏览卡片时的卡顿。
- 改进桌面端侧边栏标签树展开的稳定性。
- 改进移动端图片全屏查看体验。
- “有链接”筛选现在支持裸 `http://` 和 `https://` URL。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo 0.8.4

### Improved
- Improved Daily Note deletion and rename synchronization to preserve memo identity and prevent stale records.
- Improved index rebuilding so damaged index files do not block rebuilding from Markdown.
- Improved memo creation recovery after partial cross-file writes.

---

### 改进
- 改进日记删除与重命名同步，保留 memo 身份并避免失效记录。
- 改进索引重建，损坏的索引文件不再阻止从 Markdown 重建。
- 改进跨文件写入部分失败后的 memo 创建恢复。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo  0.8.1
### Added
- Added image previews for Memo cards, showing compact thumbnails in the card feed.
- Memo card images can now be clicked to view larger images, with support for switching between multiple images.
### Improved
- Improved the card feed refresh mechanism to reduce unnecessary full-list re-rendering.
- Improved the display experience when opening the view for the first time.
- Fix CSS compatibility issues.

---
### 新增
- 新增 Memo 卡片图片预览，在卡片流中显示紧凑缩略图。
- Memo 卡片图片可点击查看大图，支持多图切换。
### 改进
- 改进卡片流刷新机制，减少不必要的整列表重渲染。
- 改进首次打开视图时的显示体验。
- 修复 CSS 中导致兼容性的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo  0.8.0
### Added
- Added image previews for Memo cards, showing compact thumbnails in the card feed.
- Memo card images can now be clicked to view larger images, with support for switching between multiple images.
### Improved
- Improved the card feed refresh mechanism to reduce unnecessary full-list re-rendering.
- Improved the display experience when opening the view for the first time.

---
### 新增
- 新增 Memo 卡片图片预览，在卡片流中显示紧凑缩略图。
- Memo 卡片图片可点击查看大图，支持多图切换。
### 改进
- 改进卡片流刷新机制，减少不必要的整列表重渲染。
- 改进首次打开视图时的显示体验。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo  0.7.5
#### Fixed
- Fixed an issue where Obsidian Mobile could repeatedly reload files, plugins, and workspace in some large vaults or complex mobile workspaces.
- Reduced the risk of excessive DOM observation in the mobile navbar integration.
#### Improved
- Improved mobile performance and stability by optimizing how Knomo observes and updates Obsidian Mobile’s navigation UI.
- Reduced unnecessary mobile UI refreshes caused by workspace and navigation changes.
---
#### 修复
- 修复在部分大型库或复杂移动端工作区中，Obsidian Mobile 可能反复重新加载文件、插件和工作区的问题。
- 降低移动端导航栏适配中因 DOM 监听过重导致的不稳定风险。
#### 改进
- 优化 Knomo 对 Obsidian Mobile 导航栏的监听和更新方式，提升移动端稳定性和性能。
- 减少由工作区和导航栏变化引起的不必要移动端 UI 刷新。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo  0.7.4

- Added support for checkbox/task lists in Memos, making it easier to capture lightweight todos directly in Knomo.
- Improved automatic card updates across multiple devices, so Memo cards refresh more reliably when the Daily Note source file for Memos changes.
- Improved and fixed several UI styling issues for a more consistent experience across layouts, themes, and devices.

---

- 新增 checkbox/task list 支持，现在可以在 Memos 中更自然地记录轻量任务。
- 优化多终端同步后的卡片内容自动更新，当 Memos 的日记源文件有变更时，Knomo 的 Memo 卡片内容更新更加可靠。
- 改进并修复了一些样式问题，提升不同布局、主题和设备下的显示一致性。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo  0.7.1

- Added WikiLink suggestions in the memo composer. After typing `[[`, you can quickly search and insert Obsidian note links.  
- Improved Chinese memo card typography. Chinese memo cards now use a more readable justified text alignment, while non-Chinese content keeps its original natural alignment.  
- Improved reference link display names. For example, `2026060514301207` is now displayed as `20260605-143012-07`.  
- Improved CSS structure and compatibility, with better visual consistency across different themes and layouts.  
- Improved memo card rendering and Markdown content display stability.
- Fix issues found during Obsidian plugin review.

---

- 新增 Memo 输入框中的 WikiLink 联想功能, 输入 `[[` 后，可以快速搜索并插入 Obsidian 笔记链接。
- 改进中文卡片正文排版，中文 Memo 卡片现在会采用更适合阅读的文本两端对齐方式，非中文内容保持原本自然的对齐效果。
- 改进引用链接显示名，例如：`2026060514301207` 会显示为 `20260605-143012-07`。
- 改进 CSS 结构和兼容性，改进不同主题和布局下的视觉一致性。
- 改进 Memo 卡片渲染和 Markdown 内容显示的稳定性。
- 修复 Obsidian 插件审核发现的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Knomo  0.6.5

### Improved

- Improved the mobile composer keyboard interaction for a smoother and more stable input experience.
- Improved touch handling for mobile composer toolbar buttons to reduce interruptions while writing.
- Improved mobile tag filtering interactions for a smoother and more usable filtering experience.

### Fixed

- Fixed an issue where tapping toolbar buttons in the mobile composer could unexpectedly dismiss the system keyboard.

---
### 改进

- 改进移动端输入框与系统键盘的交互体验，让输入区域在键盘弹出、收起时更加自然稳定。
- 改进移动端输入框工具按钮的触控体验，减少操作按钮时对输入状态的干扰。
- 改进移动端筛选标签的交互体验，让标签筛选在手机端更顺滑、更易用。

### 修复

- 修复移动端点击输入框工具按钮时，可能导致系统键盘意外收起的问题。

releases.author: BanyanSo
releases.description:
- Improved card interaction stability to reduce unexpected jumping or position shifts after actions such as copy or click.
- Optimized CSS handling by reducing unnecessary forced styles, improving maintainability and theme compatibility.
- Improved mobile keyboard interactions, including better spacing and animation behavior between the composer, toolbar, and system keyboard.

---
- 改进卡片交互稳定性，减少复制、点击等操作后可能出现的卡片跳动或位置偏移。
- 优化 CSS 样式处理，减少不必要的强制样式，提升样式维护性与主题兼容性。
- 改进移动端键盘交互体验，优化输入框、工具栏与系统键盘之间的距离和动画表现。
releases.name: Knomo 0.6.0

releases.author: BanyanSo
releases.description:
- Improved the style and interaction of the tag suggestion popup.
- Improved the interaction for clearing edited or quoted content in the mobile input box.
- Added summaries for filter and search results.

---
- 优化标签弹框的样式和交互。 
- 优化移动端输入框清空编辑或引用内容的交互。 
- 新增筛选、搜索结果摘要。
releases.name: Knomo 0.5.2

releases.author: BanyanSo
releases.description:
### What's New  
  
- Added support for displaying the interface in Chinese or English based on the current Obsidian language.  
- Added support for applying the Daily Notes template when creating daily notes.  
- Improved the interaction and performance of `#tag` autocompletion in the input box.
  
### Fixed  
  
- Fixed an issue where the image button on mobile did not respond when clicked.  
- Fixed an issue where blank lines could be removed when writing a Memo.  
- Fixed an issue where tags with different letter casing were counted separately in the sidebar.
  
---  

## 中文  
  
### 新增  
  
- 支持根据 Obsidian 当前语言显示中文或英文界面。  
- 支持应用 Daily Notes 配置的模板创建日记。  
- 改进输入框中的 [#tag](https://github.com/BanyanSo/knomo/releases/new?tag=0.5.0#tag) 自动补全的交互和性能。  
  
### 修复  
  
- 修复移动端图片按钮点击无响应的问题。  
- 修复写入 Memo 时可能删除空行的问题。  
- 修复侧边栏标签字母大小分开统计的问题。
releases.name: Knomo 0.5.0

releases.author: BanyanSo
releases.description:
## Knomo 0.4.0

Initial public release.

### Features

- Quick memo capture
- Write memos to Daily Notes
- Automatically maintain monthly Memos Markdown files
- Card-based memo browsing
- Tags and search
- Import time-formatted list items from existing Daily Notes
- Mobile-friendly composer and navigation improvements
- Minimal theme compatibility

### Notes

- Knomo depends on Obsidian's core Daily Notes plugin.
- Please back up your Vault before importing existing Daily Note content.
releases.name: Knomo 0.4.0
